payload.name: ServiceNow, Inc.
payload.narrative: ServiceNow operates a cloud-based platform that automates and manages digital workflows for large enterprises across IT service management (ITSM), IT operations, HR, customer service, and security operations. The company is included on this watchlist because its subscription revenue growth, enterprise AI monetization trajectory, and platform expansion beyond core ITSM into company-wide workflow automation make it a useful proxy for tracking enterprise IT spending trends. ServiceNow is a constituent of the S&P 500 and Russell 1000 indices.
catalysts: Quarterly earnings and forward guidance cadence
Sector-specific demand cycle and supply-chain signals
Macro regime shifts affecting risk appetite
